name: localsearch-extractor-office
title: localsearch-extractor-office
summary: Extractors for some compressed office file formats
description:
Extractors for some compressed office file formats
This package contains the extractors for various compressed
office file formats such as oasis, msoffice-xml and epub.
.
Due to distribution complications of dependent compression libraries,
this feature is available in a separate package. Without this,
indexing of such files will not be supported.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use localsearch-extractor-office because Extractors for some compressed office file formats.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use localsearch-extractor-office as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair localsearch-extractor-office with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `localsearch-extractor-office --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
